channel.title: Runway on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Runway on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Video Generation Wars: Sora 2, Veo 3, and Runway Gen-4 in 2026
item.description: A grounded comparison of the three frontier AI video generation systems in 2026 - OpenAI's Sora 2, Google DeepMind's Veo 3.1, and Runway Gen-4.5 - what each one is, where the trade-offs land, and what the shape of the race tells us about the next year.
